Triadic Condensation INTERFACE MANIFOLD
Fine physical DOFs—
Global interface DOFs—
Global reduction—
Tip-transfer mismatch—
Fine reference error—
Condensed solve—
Preserve the fine wave geometry, eliminate internal states locally, and solve only the macro-interface system.
Triad: physical detail remains inside each cell; information crosses only through interface ports; coherence is checked by matching the full fine transfer response. This is exact dynamic condensation for the current linear frequency-domain model—not a claim of new Schur-complement mathematics.
Triadic Stability Bridge FIXED PORTS · LOCAL MODES

Coherence gateIDLE
Keep the 97-node physical model, preserve 12 interface ports, and admit fixed-interface component modes only until transfer, phase, and worst-frequency certificates all pass.
Bridge: exact dynamic condensation is frequency-dependent. This Craig–Bampton-style browser experiment creates a reusable frequency-independent reduced model. Congruence projection retains positive mass, stiffness, and proportional damping; the three-channel certificate decides how many hidden modes may enter the global system.
